creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Radim,

unfortunately, your PR [1] has been around for quite a while without the
patch being committed. In the meantime, ports/129223 has been submitted
(see [2]), which contains a patch for a more recent version of py-opengl.
There's still a problem with that patch, though, so I haven't committed
it, yet. Your patch contained a couple of other changes to improve the
port which the update to the newer version doesn't contain. Can I
encourage you to have a look at the other PR and maybe provide some input
to merge your improvements and the update to the new version?

Regards,
Stefan

[1]: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/116083
[2]: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/129223
